estimated_cost_impact_reasoning: SM-A 40% allocation cut requires spot market sourcing for deficit volume at ~30% premium over contract price. Sensitivity $16.40/kg API per $1/kg SM-A movement. Estimated spot premium: +$342/kg API on affected batches.
estimated_timeline_reasoning: Spot market procurement and inbound QC: 10–12 weeks. Risk of batch sequencing delays if spot lot fails release testing.
caveats: Spot premium estimate based on 2025 market data — current tightness may be higher.
Allocation cut duration unknown; force majeure could extend beyond initial notice period.
